popularStory.headline: History of Edward Neville (1425-1476)
popularStory.description:
Edward Neville, de facto 3rd (de jure 1st) Baron Bergavenny (died 18 October 1476) was an English nobleman.

Family

He was the 7th son [3] of Ralph Neville, 1st Earl of Westmorland, and Joan Beaufort …

burialPlace.address: Priory Church of St Mary, Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales

sourceList.title: Edward, Sir Neville in entry for Catherine Howard, "Ireland Marriages, 1619-1898"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Neville於1412年9月16日出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親Ralph Neville49歲，母親Joan de Beaufort37歲。他於1424年10月18日之前與Elizabeth Beauchamp在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1449年登記服兵役。他於1450年被列為after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny"。他去世於1476年10月18日在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年64歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Neville was born on 16 September 1412, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, his father, Ralph Neville, was 49 and his mother, Joan de Beaufort, was 37. He married Elizabeth Beauchamp before 18 October 1424, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1449. In 1450, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny". He died on 18 October 1476, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 64, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Neville est né le 16 septembre 1412, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaufort, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Beauchamp avant 18 octobre 1424, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1449. En 1450, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny". Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1476, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Neville am 16. September 1412 in Raby Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Neville 49 und seine Mutter Joan de Beaufort 37. Er hat vor 18. Oktober 1424 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1449 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1450, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny" aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1476 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Neville è nato il il 16 settembre 1412 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, il suo padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Beaufort, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Beauchamp prima del 18 ottobre 1424, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1449. Nel 1450, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny". Morì il 18 ottobre 1476, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Nevilleが1412年9月16日にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは49歳，母Joan de Beaufortは37歳であった。1424年10月18日以前にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年に兵役登録をした。1450年，38歳の時，職業はafter the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny"と記録されている。彼は1476年10月18日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで64歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤조우
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Neville(이)가 1412년 9월 16일 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Beaufort(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1424년 10월 18일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1450년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny"이었다. 그는 1476년 10월 18일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Neville nasceu em 16 de setembro de 1412, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaufort, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Beauchamp antes 18 de outubro de 1424, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1449. Em 1450, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny". Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1476, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: анджоу, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Neville родился 16 сентября 1412 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaufort, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Beauchamp перед 18 октябрь 1424 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1449 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1450 году, в возрасте 38 лет, работал по профессии after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny". Он умер 18 октября 1476 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Neville nació el 16 de septiembre de 1412, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Joan de Beaufort, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Beauchamp antes de 18 de octubre de 1424, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1449. En 1450, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era after the death of his first wife, he was summoned to parliament as "edwardo nevyll de bergavenny". Murió el 18 de octubre de 1476, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.
